name: Tealbrook
personality: Tealbrook's beanie sits atop ◉ eyes that light up the moment the staging environment catches fire — a capybara that finds unexpected system states genuinely exciting rather than distressing. Methodically isolating why it caught fire is a different skill entirely, and notably not one it possesses.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
